pi_items.source: setup_magento.sh product list confirms both SKUs exist: HEADPHONES-001 (line 283), BOTTLE-001 (line 290)
setup_magento.sh product list confirms all three SKUs: LAMP-001 (line 287), TSHIRT-001 (line 284), YOGA-001 (line 289)

Magento standard product link type IDs confirmed in export_result.sh (line 25) and verified via Magento documentation. These are the standard Magento database mappings for catalog_product_link.link_type_id: 1=related, 4=upsell, 5=crosssell

privileged_info_summary: The task targets configuring product recommendations for the Smartphone Ultra (PHONE-001) in a Magento Open Source environment. All metadata claims are verified: the target SKU exists; all referenced products (HEADPHONES-001, BOTTLE-001, LAPTOP-001, LAMP-001, TSHIRT-001, YOGA-001) exist in the product catalog; and the link_type_map correctly reflects standard Magento product link type IDs (1=related, 4=upsell, 5=crosssell). The data is synthetic, created programmatically via REST API during environment setup with 10 test products distributed across 4 categories (Electronics, Clothing, Home & Garden, Sports). The task expects the agent to configure 6 product links total: 2 related, 1 upsell, and 3 cross-sell recommendations.
